channel.title: Documentation on HAL Management Console
channel.description: Recent content in Documentation on HAL Management Console

item.title: Get Started
item.description: The HAL management console is part of every WildFly and JBoss EAP installation. To get started simply add an user via the add-user.sh script, fire up your browser and open http://localhost:9990.

item.title: End User
item.description: The HAL management console features a rich user interface to configure, analyse and monitor the complete WildFly management model. The console uses six main sections: homepage, deployments, configuration, runtime, patching and access control.
